features_overview.title: Ask, Answer & Organize
features_overview.subtitle: Packed with powerful features designed to help your team capture, organize, and share knowledge effectively.

items.title: Full-text Search
items.description: Every question, answer, and comment is indexed for fast, accurate search. Find knowledge in seconds.

items.title: Enterprise SSO
items.description: LDAP, SAML 2.0, OAuth 2.0 and SCIM support for seamless integration with your existing identity provider.

items.title: Reputation & Badges
items.description: Built-in gamification with reputation points, achievement badges, and leaderboards to incentivize participation.

items.title: On-Premises Deployment
items.description: Preserve full ownership of your data. Deployable as a Docker container, to any cloud provider, as a JAR or native executable.

items.title: REST API
items.description: Full-featured REST API for integrations, custom automations, and embedding Scoold content in your existing tools. MCP server, coming soon.

items.title: Multiple Spaces
items.description: Create separate spaces for different teams, departments, or projects - all from a single Scoold instance.

features_page.title: Features built for collaboration
features_page.description: Full feature breakdown of Scoold - Q&A, enterprise SSO (LDAP, SAML, SCIM), REST API, multi-space, analytics and more.
features_page.subtitle: From editing history to enterprise SSO, Scoold provides everything you need to build a world-class internal knowledge hub.
features_page.themes: Light UI, dark UI, or anything in between.

features.title: Full featured Q&A platform
features.description: Scoold is inspired by Stack Overflow and implements most of its features. You can ask and answer questions, upvote and downvote posts, earn badges and reputation. Each edit creates an new revision, making it easy to follow the history of edits.

features.title: Reputation & Badges
features.description: Scoold has a simple but effective reputation system with badges. People are awarded reputation points for good questions and answers, as well as various badges for their achievements on the site. You can also create your own custom badges.

features.title: Email Notifications
features.description: You can subscribe to each question thread by clicking the checkbox at the bottom. Scoold will send you emails whenever a new answer is published. Also you can subscribe to replies to your own answers from the settings page.

features.title: Geolocation Filtering
features.description: Questions can be associated with a specific location and then filtered based on that location. This feature enables geolocation queries an gives you the option to search for questions around you.

features.title: Modern, Responsive & SEO-friendly
features.description: Scoold features a modern look-and-feel which looks great on any device. Server-side rendering for all pages with tidy URLs, easily crawlable by search engines and AI.

features.title: Full-text Search
features.description: All content is indexed and analyzed by Para. You can search for users, questions and answers from the search bar on top.

features.title: Similar Posts Suggestions
features.description: When you ask a new question, Scoold will give you hints if a similar question already exist. Additionally, on each question page there's a sidebar with suggestions for the top 10 similar posts.

features.title: Rich Content
features.description: Scoold can display content in Markdown (GFM) with attached multimedia, files and code snippets with full syntax highlighting. The Markdown editor is powerful and supports, images, links, emojis and preview.

features.title: Spaces (Groups)
features.description: Spaces are a way to organize users and questions into isolated groups. You can edit users' spaces in bulk and also move a question to a different space. Permission to access a space is given by an administrator.

features.title: Backup & Restore
features.description: Administrators can easily export all the data from Scoold as a zipped archive. The exported data can later be imported into another Scoold instance.

features.title: Themes & Customization
features.description: Quickly change the look and feel by using one of the bundled themes or create your own. The CSS styles are fully customizable and you can create custom themes. Add your brand and logo (white-label), and use your own domain name.

features.title: I18n & RTL Language Support
features.description: The whole website is easily translatable into other languages. Right-to-left languages are also supported and the layout is mirrored if an RTL language is detected.

features.title: LDAP Authentication
features.description: Both LDAP and Active Directory are supported. Team members can authenticate with your company's LDAP server for a seamless single sign-on experience.

features.title: SAML 2.0 SSO {pro}
features.description: Single sign-on with Okta, Azure AD, Auth0, and all major SAML identity providers. This makes it super easy for organizations to leverage existing centralized identity management infrastructure.

features.title: SCIM Provisioning {pro}
features.description: Automatic user provisioning and deprovisioning via the SCIM 2.0 protocol. Manage all users centrally, quickly provision and deprovision accounts from your identity platform of choice.

features.title: Social Login & 2FA
features.description: People can also log in with any social account. Plain-old email-and-password logins are also supported. For optimal security, users can enable two-factor authentication with time-based tokens (TOTP).

features.title: Custom Authentication {pro}
features.description: Redirect users to your company's login page for a custom single sign-on experience. Virtually any external authentication provider can be made to work with Scoold in this way.

features.title: SSL & mTLS
features.description: Secure all connections to Scoold with HTTPS by using your own SSL certificate without the need for a proxy. Tighten security with mutual authentication between a proxy, Scoold and Para (mTLS).

features.title: RESTful API
features.description: A fully-fledged RESTful JSON API defined with an OpenAPI spec. All CRUD operations can be executed through the API from your code.

features.title: Slack, Mattermost & Teams Integration {pro}
features.description: Create questions and answers from Slack, Mattermost or Microsoft Teams, get real-time in-channel notification of new posts and mentions, approve posts and perform searches. Scoold can map your teams and chat channels to spaces.

features.title: Zapier Integration {pro}
features.description: Zapier makes it easy to integrate Scoold with thousands of other applications. Thanks to the power of REST hooks, you can have questions created automatically based on data from an external app or configure Scoold to notify other apps when a new question is posted.

features.title: Import from Stack Overflow
features.description: Migrating from Stack Overflow for Teams (Business) to Scoold is effortless and seamless. Simply download your data from Stack Overflow and import it into Scoold.

features.title: Akismet Integration
features.description: With automatic anti-spam protection powered by Akismet's advanced AI filters, Scoold gives you a peace of mind. Spam can be deleted instantly if detected or you can choose to leave it to moderators for review.

features.title: Webhooks
features.description: HTTP webhooks for all major events: new questions, answers, votes, and more. The payloads are signed with HMAC-SHA256 for extra security.

features.title: Mentions {pro}
features.description: Mention anyone in your posts with @Name. Administrators can turn on an mention notifications for all users or have each user decide if they want to opt-in. Mentions make discussions better by allowing you to engage the right people.

features.title: File Uploads {pro}
features.description: Easily attach images and documents to posts. Files can either be uploaded to the local file system or to Microsoft Azure Blob Storage, AWS S3 or Imgur.

features.title: Sticky & Favorite Posts
features.description: Questions marked as "sticky" will always appear on top, before all the others. You can also mark your favorite questions with ♥ and they'll be saved to your profile.

features.title: Anonymous Posts
features.description: This can either be enabled or disabled. When enabled, anybody will be able to ask a question or submit an answer. This lowers the barrier for new users and increases engagement.

features.title: Wiki-Style Answers
features.description: Make your answers editable by everyone by checking the "wiki" checkbox. This is useful if you want to allow everyone to contribute to the knowledge around a question, regardless of their reputation points.

features.title: Email Digest
features.description: Administrators can turn on an email digest for all users or have each user decide if they want to opt-in. And email digest contains a summary of the top questions published recently on Scoold. This can increase engagement and stimulate users to come back to the site.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent
pricing.description: Simple one-time pricing for Scoold. Free open-source Community edition, Scoold Pro, or Scoold Pro with Source. No subscriptions, no per-seat fees.
pricing.subtitle: No subscriptions. No per-seat fees. A one-time license fee and it's yours forever.
pricing.note: 🛈 Scoold Pro licenses include free updates and support for 12 months after purchase. Prices shown above are for a single license valid for one Scoold Pro instance running in production.

enterprise.title: Need a custom enterprise arrangement?
enterprise.description: Unlimited instance licensing, priority support, or custom procurement - we can work with your procurement team.

pricing_faq.title: Pricing FAQ
pricing_faq.subtitle: Common questions about Scoold licensing and pricing.

items.q: Can I upgrade from Community to Pro later?
items.a: Yes. You can start with Scoold (free) and purchase a Pro license at any time. Your existing data, users, and configuration migrate seamlessly.

items.q: Does the license cover multiple instances?
items.a: No. A single Scoold Pro license covers only one instance running in a production environment. You can purchase as many license as you need, depending on your instance count.

items.q: What happens after 12 months of free updates?
items.a: Your license continues to work indefinitely - you're never forced to upgrade. After 12 months, you can purchase an extended update period to continue receiving new features and security patches.

items.q: Do you offer refunds?
items.a: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee if Scoold Pro doesn't meet your needs. Contact support@scoold.com within 14 days of purchase.

items.q: Is Scoold Cloud priced differently?
items.a: Yes - Scoold Cloud offers Scoold Pro hosting with subscription pricing. Check Scoold Cloud for details.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept VISA, MasterCard, American Express and Discover cards. Online payments are handled by Braintree, Ireland. We also accept bank transfers (SEPA) and offer VAT invoices upon request.

plans.name: Scoold
plans.description: Everything you need to get started. Self-hosted, open source, fully customizable.

plans.name: Scoold Pro
plans.description: Best for teams of any size. Includes all the premium features.
features: Unlimited spaces, admins and approved domains

plans.name: Pro + Source
plans.description: All Scoold Pro features, plus access to the source code repository.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.description: Frequently asked questions about Scoold - pricing, deployment, SSO, licensing, and more.
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Scoold. Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to our support team.

support_cta.title: Still have questions?
support_cta.subtitle: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.

items.q: What is Scoold and how is it different from Scoold Pro?
items.a: Scoold is open-source and licensed under Apache 2.0. It's completely free. Scoold Pro is a commercial product that adds enterprise features like file uploads, SAML, SCIM provisioning, Teams/Mattermost/Slack integrations, and more.

items.q: What does a Scoold Pro license allow me to do?
items.a: Buying a Scoold Pro license allows you to deploy one instance of Scoold Pro on one host machine (VM, container, K8s pod, etc.) and receive new releases and fixes for a period of 1 year. The license has 3 tiers - Pro basic, Pro with source, Pro unlimited. With the basic license you get the Scoold Pro binary files. The "Pro with source" license gives you the binaries and the complete source code for Scoold Pro (in a private Git repo). For larger organizations and resellers, there's the unlimited license which gives you the source code, binaries and permission to run Scoold Pro on an unlimited number of production hosts. This is ideal for resellers or organisations with larger deployments.

items.q: Is the source code included with Scoold Pro?
items.a: The source code is only available with the "Scoold Pro with source" and "Scoold Pro unlimited" license tiers. Get in touch with us for more details.

items.q: Can I use Scoold on-premises or in my private cloud?
items.a: Absolutely. Scoold is designed for self-hosted deployment. You can run it as a Docker container, a standalone JAR, or deploy it to AWS, Azure, GCP, or any other cloud provider. Your data never leaves your infrastructure.

items.q: What identity providers are supported for SSO?
items.a: Scoold Pro supports SAML 2.0 SSO with any compliant identity provider, including Okta, Azure Active Directory, Auth0, OneLogin, Ping Identity, and Google Workspace. LDAP and Active Directory integration is also available for on-premises environments.

items.q: How does licensing work for Scoold Pro?
items.a: Scoold Pro uses a one-time perpetual license model. You pay once and own the license forever with no per-seat or subscription fees. The license covers a single production instance with unlimited users. Updates, support and source code access (if applicable) are free for 12 months after purchase.

items.q: Is there a trial or demo available?
items.a: Yes! You can try the live demo - no account required. Scoold is free to download and run locally, so you can evaluate the full platform before purchasing Pro.

items.q: What technology does Scoold run on?
items.a: Scoold is a Java application built on top of Spring Boot. Backend operations are handled by Para - our open-source backend platform. It requires Java 21+ and works with all popular databases. Docker images are provided for easy setup.

items.q: Can I customize the look and feel?
items.a: Yes. The styling is fully customizable. Scoold also supports white-labeling: custom logo, brand colors, custom domain, and the ability to embed Scoold within your existing intranet or portal.

items.q: What kind of support is included?
items.a: Basic support is included: email, Gitter chat and access to GitHub issues. Scoold Pro includes email support with a 1-business-day response time. Priority support is also available at extra cost.

items.q: Does Scoold have a hosted cloud version?
items.a: Yes! Scoold Cloud is our fully managed hosted solution. We handle deployment, updates, backups, and security patches. Visit cloud.scoold.com to learn more about plans and pricing.

items.q: Can I migrate from Stack Overflow Business?
items.a: Scoold supports importing data from Stack Overflow and that makes migration straightforward. We also offer additional migration assistance for Pro customers. Contact us to discuss your specific migration needs.

Built-in search, reputation, and SSO from day one
Available as open source or a premium version - Scoold Pro

blog_page.title: Guides & insights
blog_page.description: The Scoold blog - guides, tutorials, and insights on knowledge management, team collaboration, and enterprise Q&A.
blog_page.subtitle: Tutorials, best practices, and insights on knowledge sharing, team collaboration, and getting the most from Scoold.

solutions.title: Scoold as a Knowledge Base
solutions.subtitle: Capture, organize, and surface institutional knowledge before it walks out the door.
solutions.description: Teams lose countless hours searching for answers that already exist somewhere. Scoold's searchable, structured knowledge base ensures the right information reaches the right person instantly.

features.title: Searchable Knowledge Repository
features.description: Every document, answer, and conversation is indexed and searchable. Typo tolerance and relevance ranking surface the right content first.

features.title: Structured with Tags & Wikis
features.description: Organize content by topic, team, product, or any taxonomy that fits your organization.

features.title: Expert Identification
features.description: Reputation system surfaces your internal experts. Know who to ask before you ask.

features.title: Version History
features.description: Full edit history for every article. Track who changed what and when.

solutions.title: Scoold as a Community Forum
solutions.subtitle: Build a thriving community around your product, project, or organization.
solutions.description: Whether it's an open-source project, a SaaS product, or an internal guild, Scoold provides the discussion platform your community deserves - without the lock-in.

features.title: Threaded Discussions
features.description: Q&A format with threaded comments creates structured, searchable discussions instead of chat noise.

features.title: Reputation & Gamification
features.description: Points, badges, and leaderboards keep your community engaged and reward helpful contributors.

features.title: Open or Private
features.description: Public-facing community or private, login-required forum - your choice.

features.title: Self-hosted or Cloud
features.description: You own your community data. Deploy anywhere, migrate anytime.

solutions.title: Scoold as a Developer Hub
solutions.subtitle: Give your engineering team a dedicated space to ask, answer, and document technical knowledge.
solutions.description: Engineers spend too much time asking questions in Slack that disappear into history. Scoold creates a permanent, searchable record of technical knowledge that compounds over time.

features.title: Code-first Editor
features.description: Markdown with syntax highlighting for all major languages. Questions and answers look as good as your code.

features.title: Slack & Teams Integration
features.description: Questions asked in Slack can be automatically routed to Scoold for a permanent, searchable record.

features.title: API Documentation Hub
features.description: Use Scoold alongside your OpenAPI docs to handle developer Q&A.

features.title: Git & CI/CD Friendly
features.description: REST API enables integration into your developer workflows and toolchains.

solutions.title: Scoold as a Support Center
solutions.subtitle: Reduce ticket volume by turning repeat support questions into self-serve answers.
solutions.description: The best support ticket is the one that never gets opened. Scoold's public-facing Q&A lets customers find answers themselves while your team builds a growing library of solutions.

features.title: Searchable Self-service
features.description: Customers search before they submit. Reduce tier-1 tickets by up to 40%.

features.title: Expert Escalation
features.description: Unanswered questions can be escalated to the right subject-matter expert automatically.

features.title: Customer-facing or Internal
features.description: Public Q&A for customers, private space for internal team escalations - or both.

features.title: Analytics & Insights
features.description: See which questions get asked most. Identify gaps in your product documentation.

solutions.title: Scoold as a Q&A Platform
solutions.subtitle: The Stack Overflow experience, running entirely on your own infrastructure.
solutions.description: Scoold was purpose-built as a Q&A platform. Every feature - voting, accepted answers, tags, reputation - mirrors the experience your team already knows from Stack Overflow, without the subscription cost.

features.title: Voting & Accepted Answers
features.description: The Q&A workflow your team already knows. Upvotes, downvotes, and accepted answers surface the best content.

features.title: Tag-based Organization
features.description: Tag questions by technology, topic, or team. Tag wikis provide context for every tag.

features.title: Reputation System
features.description: Reputation scores reflect real contribution. High-rep users earn moderation privileges.

features.title: Unanswered Queue
features.description: Dedicated view for unanswered questions ensures nothing falls through the cracks.

solutions.title: Scoold as a Knowledge Sharing Platform
solutions.subtitle: Break down information silos and create a culture of sharing across your entire organization.
solutions.description: Knowledge hoarded in individual inboxes, private docs, and Slack DMs is knowledge lost. Scoold creates a culture where sharing is the default - and where every insight is findable forever.

features.title: Cross-team Visibility
features.description: Break down department silos. Make knowledge visible across the entire organization.

features.title: Recognition & Reward
features.description: Gamification mechanics reward sharing. Top contributors are celebrated.

features.title: Onboarding Acceleration
features.description: New hires find answers from day one. Reduce time-to-productivity by weeks.

features.title: Living Documentation
features.description: Unlike wikis, Scoold content stays current - answers get updated when things change.

stack_overflow.title: Scoold vs Stack Overflow Business
stack_overflow.subtitle: Same Q&A experience. No subscription. Your data, your infrastructure.
stack_overflow.intro: Stack Overflow Business is a great product, but it comes with per-seat monthly fees that add up fast, and your data lives in their cloud. Scoold gives you the same battle-tested Q&A format - self-hosted, with a one-time license.

apache_answers.title: Scoold vs Apache Answer
apache_answers.subtitle: Two strong open-source Q&A platforms - here's how they compare.
apache_answers.intro: Apache Answer is a well-built open-source Q&A platform under the Apache Software Foundation. Scoold offers comparable core features with a stronger enterprise story: Pro edition with LDAP/SAML, a hosted cloud option, and a mature Java stack.

discourse.title: Scoold vs Discourse
discourse.subtitle: Q&A or forum? When structured answers matter more than conversation threads.
discourse.intro: Discourse is an excellent forum platform optimized for long-form discussion threads. Scoold is purpose-built for Q&A - where finding the best answer quickly is the goal. Both are open-source and self-hostable.

teams.title: Scoold + Microsoft Teams
teams.subtitle: Ask questions from Teams. Get answers in Scoold. Build a permanent knowledge base.
teams.description: Stop losing knowledge in Teams chat threads. With the Scoold + Microsoft Teams integration, questions from your Teams channels are automatically posted to Scoold, where they get answered and indexed permanently.

features.title: Post to Scoold from Teams
features.description: Use a slash command or bot mention to post a question directly to Scoold without leaving Teams.

features.title: Notifications in Teams
features.description: Get notified in Teams when your Scoold question is answered or commented on.

features.title: Knowledge Capture
features.description: Every Teams conversation that ends with a Scoold answer becomes a permanent, searchable resource.

setup_steps: Install the Scoold connector in Microsoft Teams admin center
Configure your Scoold Pro instance with the Teams webhook URL
Set up notification channels for new questions and answers
Start posting - questions flow automatically from Teams to Scoold

slack.title: Scoold + Slack
slack.subtitle: Turn Slack questions into permanent knowledge - automatically.
slack.description: Questions asked in Slack evaporate after 90 days on free plans. Scoold captures them permanently. Set up the integration once and every question your team asks in Slack has a home in your knowledge base.

features.title: Slash Command
features.description: Use /scoold ask to post questions to Scoold directly from any Slack channel.

features.title: Answer Notifications
features.description: Get a Slack DM when your question is answered on Scoold.

features.title: Channel Digests
features.description: Weekly digest of unanswered questions posted to a designated Slack channel.

setup_steps: Create a Slack App and get your bot token and webhook URL
Add the Slack webhook URL in Scoold Pro settings
Configure which Slack channels to monitor or post to
Install the Slack App to your workspace

mattermost.title: Scoold + Mattermost
mattermost.subtitle: Self-hosted chat meets self-hosted knowledge base.
mattermost.description: If your organization runs Mattermost for secure, self-hosted chat, Scoold is the perfect companion for knowledge management. Both run on your infrastructure - complete data sovereignty.

features.title: Incoming Webhooks
features.description: Scoold posts new questions and answers to configured Mattermost channels via incoming webhooks.

features.title: Slash Commands
features.description: Ask questions from Mattermost and have them automatically posted to Scoold.

features.title: Full Self-hosted Stack
features.description: Mattermost + Scoold = a completely self-hosted communication and knowledge management stack.

setup_steps: Create an Incoming Webhook in Mattermost
Add the webhook URL in your Scoold Pro configuration
Create a Slash Command in Mattermost pointing to your Scoold instance
Test by posting a question from Mattermost

zapier.title: Scoold + Zapier
zapier.subtitle: Connect Scoold to 5,000+ apps - no code required.
zapier.description: Zapier connects Scoold's REST API to thousands of other tools. Automate workflows like notifying Jira when a new question is tagged 'bug', or adding unanswered questions to your team's project management tool.

features.title: Trigger on New Questions
features.description: Fire Zapier automations whenever a new question is posted, answered, or tagged.

features.title: Push to Any Tool
features.description: Route Scoold events to Jira, Trello, Notion, Airtable, HubSpot, or any Zapier-supported app.

features.title: Automate Moderation
features.description: Use Zapier to auto-flag questions, assign experts, or create follow-up tasks.

setup_steps: Create a Zapier account (free tier works)
Connect the Scoold Zapier app using your API key
Choose your trigger (new question, new answer, new user, etc.)
Connect to your target app and configure the action

open_source.title: Open source and proud of it
open_source.description: Scoold is open source (Apache 2.0). Security, transparency, and no vendor lock-in. Deploy anywhere, own your data.
open_source.subtitle: We believe in transparency, community ownership, and freedom from vendor lock-in.

benefits.title: Security you can verify
benefits.description: The source code is public. You can audit every line, run your own security scans, and verify there are no backdoors or unexpected data collection.

benefits.title: No vendor lock-in
benefits.description: Your data, your infrastructure, your rules. Migrate your data anytime using the REST API. No proprietary formats or walled gardens.

benefits.title: Community driven
benefits.description: Feature ideas, bug reports, and pull requests are always welcome. We strive to resolve issues quickly and listen to what users really need.

benefits.title: Deploy anywhere
benefits.description: We are committed to integrating Scoold with the open standards used in the industry, like OCI. Scoold can be easily deployed using Docker or with the provided Helm chart for Kubernetes.

cloud.title: Scoold Pro Hosting
cloud.subtitle: Get a Scoold Pro server up and running in minutes, without worrying about deployment or maintainance.
cloud.description: Skip the infrastructure management - Scoold Cloud offers fully managed Scoold hosting with automatic updates, backups, and security patches.
cloud.note: 🛈 Billing is on a monthly basis. Annual billing is also available - pay 10 months and get 2 months free. The prices don't include European Union VAT (not applicable to customers outside the EU).

features.title: Up in minutes
features.description: Your Scoold instance is provisioned instantly. No server setup, no Docker commands.

features.title: Fully Managed
features.description: Automatic updates, security patches, TLS certificates, and regular backups included.

features.title: Batteries Included
features.description: Your instance is ready to go, with preconfigured SMTP server and file storage settings. You can bring your own storage as well.

features.title: Powered by AWS
features.description: Scoold Cloud is built on industry-standard, best-in-class services of the largest public cloud provider - AWS.

features.title: Regional Availability
features.description: Choose between 20 regions worldwide for optimal latency.

features.title: Dedicated support
features.description: Cloud customers get priority support with a dedicated support contact.

pricing_faq.title: Scoold Cloud FAQ
pricing_faq.subtitle: Common questions about our Scoold Pro hosting service.

items.q: Is there a free plan?
items.a: No, but you can try out the service for 5 days (no credit card required).

items.q: What are app credits and do I need to buy them?
items.a: For each server you want to deploy, you will need to purchase a server credit. Similarly, if you need a hosted Para app for your server, you will need to purchase one app credit as well. You don't have to buy app credits if already have a Para app hosted somewhere. Scoold Cloud integrates with Para Cloud (paraio.com) so you can manage your servers and apps with a single account.

items.q: Where is my Scoold Pro server going to be hosted?
items.a: Scoold Pro servers are hosted on the AWS cloud, in a region of your choice (one of the 20 regions worldwide).

items.q: How can I configure my hosted Scoold Pro server?
items.a: With the help of a wizard in the admin console. You can edit the entire Scoold configuration file right inside your browser. There's also a web API for configuring and deploying your hosted Scoold Pro server.

items.q: Which authentication methods are supported?
items.a: All the ones supported in Scoold Pro, including SAML, LDAP, OAuth 2.0 and custom authentication with JWTs.

items.q: Do I need to buy a Scoold Pro license in order to use Scoold Cloud?
items.a: No, you don't. License fees, as well as hosting fees, are included in the price of Scoold Cloud.

items.q: Do I need to run my own Para server to store data for my Scoold Cloud servers?
items.a: Not at all - our cloud-based Para service is integrated in Scoold Cloud. Optionally, are free to self-host Para in order to keep full control of your data.

items.q: Which Scoold Pro server version am I going to get?
items.a: Typically the latest stable version of Scoold Pro. Upgrades will be handled by us, transparently to you and with zero service downtime.

items.q: What is the billing cycle?
items.a: Usage is billed monthly or yearly, according to the number of running Scoold Pro servers for the period. Annual subscriptions get 2 months free.

items.q: Do you issue VAT invoices?
items.a: Yes, we do. You can enter a VAT number on checkout or in the billing portal (Account > My Subscription).

plans.name: Para App
plans.description: Scoold needs a Para app for storing data. If you don't have one already, you can purchase Para app credits.

plans.name: Small Instance
plans.description: Suitable for most workloads and teams with less than 1000 members.

plans.name: Large Instance
plans.description: Suitable for larger teams with up to 10K concurrent users.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This document describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal data, in accordance with the European GDPR law.

sections.title: 1. Data Controller
paragraphs: Erudika Ltd., 4 Lelinska Chuka Street, Sofia 1618, Bulgaria.
Erudika Ltd. acts as the Data Controller for the purposes of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation - GDPR).

sections.title: 2. Personal Data We Collect
paragraphs: We collect personal data directly from you when you contact us or use our services, and automatically through technical means when you visit our website.
items: Contact details you provide (name, email, company, message).
Account or contract details when you request support or services.
Technical data such as IP address, browser type, and basic device information.
Usage data from analytics (pages visited, time on site, referral source).

sections.title: 3. Legal Bases for Processing
paragraphs: Our legitimate interests include maintaining website security, preventing fraud, improving our services, and managing customer relationships. Where we rely on legitimate interests, we ensure that such interests are not overridden by your rights and freedoms.

Where personal data is required for contract performance, failure to provide such data may result in our inability to provide the requested services. Other reasons for collecting and processing data may include:
items: Consent (e.g., marketing emails, optional analytics).
Contract performance (e.g., providing support or services you request).
Legitimate interests (e.g., securing our site, improving our services).
Legal obligations (e.g., accounting and compliance requirements).
Technical information (e.g. server logs, cookies identifiers, communication records)

sections.title: 4. How We Use Your Data
items: Respond to inquiries and provide support.
Deliver products or services you request.
Improve our website and user experience.
Maintain security, prevent fraud, and comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: 5. Cookies and Analytics
paragraphs: We use essential cookies for site functionality. We may use privacy-friendly analytics to understand site usage. Where required, we ask for consent before placing non-essential cookies.
We are committed to not using tracking cookies. For traffic analysis we use Matomo with the highest privacy settings.

sections.title: 6. Sharing and International Transfers
paragraphs: We share data only with service providers who process data on our behalf (e.g., hosting, email, analytics). If data is transferred outside the EEA, we use appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses.

Where personal data is transferred outside the European Economic Area (EEA), we ensure appropriate safeguards in accordance with Chapter V GDPR, including the use of Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission. You may request a copy of these safeguards by contacting us.

sections.title: 7. Data Retention
paragraphs: We retain personal data only as long as needed for the purposes described, or as required by law. We periodically review and delete data that is no longer necessary.
items: Contact inquiries: retained for up to 24 months after resolution.
Contractual data: retained for the duration of the contract plus applicable statutory limitation periods.
Accounting data: retained as required under Bulgarian accounting law (10 years).
Analytics data: retained for 12 months.

sections.title: 8. Your Rights
paragraphs: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Bulgarian Commission for Personal Data Protection (КЗЛД) or your local supervisory authority within the EU.
items: Access your personal data and request a copy.
Correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
Request deletion of your data (subject to legal requirements).
Object to processing or request restriction.
Data portability where applicable.
Withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent.
Lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.
To exercise your rights, please contact us. We may request verification of your identity before responding.

sections.title: 9. Security
paragraphs: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

sections.title: 10. Children's Privacy
paragraphs: Our services are not directed to children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect data from children. If you believe a child has provided us data, please contact us.

sections.title: 11. Changes to This Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will post the updated version on this page and update the effective date above.

sections.title: 12. Data Protection Officer
sections.contactIntro: Erudika Ltd. has appointed a Data Protection Officer in accordance with Article 37 of GDPR: Alexander Bogdanovski

sections.title: 13. Mandatory disclosure under Article 13 (2) (e)
paragraphs: Providing certain personal data is necessary for entering into and performing a contract. Where data is required, we will indicate this. Failure to provide required data may prevent us from providing services.

sections.title: 14. Automated Decision-Making Disclosure
paragraphs: We do not use personal data for automated decision-making or profiling that produces legal or similarly significant effects.

terms.title: Terms of Use

sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.content: By accessing scoold.com, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use this site.

sections.heading: License
sections.content: Scoold (Community edition) is open source software licensed under the Apache 2.0 License. Scoold Pro is commercial software governed by the Scoold Pro EULA.

sections.heading: Permitted Use
sections.content: You may use this site to download, evaluate, and purchase Scoold software for your own use in accordance with the applicable license terms.

sections.heading: Prohibited Use
sections.content: You may not use this site for unlawful purposes, to transmit malicious code, or to violate the rights of others.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
sections.content: Scoold is provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind. Erudika disclaims all warranties, express or implied, to the extent permitted by law.

sections.heading: Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Disputes shall be resolved in the courts of England and Wales.
